name: triggerPDU
title: triggerPDU
description: Triggers a PDU to be sent. If the PDU has an update bit it will be set. After the PDU was sent the update bit will be reset.
availability: CAN AUTOSAR PDUs Ethernet AUTOSAR PDUs FlexRay AUTOSAR PDUs (since version 9.0 SP3)
